parameters.query:
with user_row as (
    select
        u.id as user_id,
        us.base_currency,
        us.report_currency,
        us.language_code
    from moneytrack.app_users u
    join moneytrack.user_settings us
        on us.user_id = u.id
    where u.telegram_user_id =
    {{ Number($json.query?.telegram_user_id || $json.body?.telegram_user_id || 0) }}
),

transaction_movements as (
    select
        t.account_id,
        case
            when t.transaction_type = 'openingbalance' then t.amount_original
            when t.transaction_type = 'income' then t.amount_original
            when t.transaction_type = 'expense' then -t.amount_original
            when t.transaction_type = 'adjustment' then t.amount_original
            else 0
        end as amount
    from moneytrack.transactions t
    join user_row u on u.user_id = t.user_id
),

transfer_movements as (
    select
        tr.from_account_id as account_id,
        -tr.from_amount as amount
    from moneytrack.transfers tr
    join user_row u on u.user_id = tr.user_id

    union all

    select
        tr.to_account_id as account_id,
        tr.to_amount as amount
    from moneytrack.transfers tr
    join user_row u on u.user_id = tr.user_id
),

balances as (
    select
        account_id,
        sum(amount) as balance
    from (
        select * from transaction_movements
        union all
        select * from transfer_movements
    ) x
    group by account_id
),

summary_by_currency as (
    select
        t.currency_original as currency_code,

        sum(case when t.transaction_type = 'income' then t.amount_original else 0 end) as income,
        sum(case when t.transaction_type = 'expense' then t.amount_original else 0 end) as expense,
        sum(case when t.transaction_type = 'adjustment' then t.amount_original else 0 end) as adjustment,

        sum(
            case
                when t.transaction_type = 'income' then t.amount_original
                when t.transaction_type = 'expense' then -t.amount_original
                when t.transaction_type = 'adjustment' then t.amount_original
                else 0
            end
        ) as result

    from moneytrack.transactions t
    join user_row u on u.user_id = t.user_id
    where date_trunc('month', t.transaction_date) = date_trunc('month', current_date)
    group by t.currency_original
),

summary_converted as (
    select
        s.*,
        u.report_currency,
        case
            when s.currency_code = u.report_currency then 1
            else er.rate
        end as rate_to_report,

        s.income *
        case when s.currency_code = u.report_currency then 1 else er.rate end as income_report,

        s.expense *
        case when s.currency_code = u.report_currency then 1 else er.rate end as expense_report,

        s.adjustment *
        case when s.currency_code = u.report_currency then 1 else er.rate end as adjustment_report,

        s.result *
        case when s.currency_code = u.report_currency then 1 else er.rate end as result_report

    from summary_by_currency s
    cross join user_row u
    left join moneytrack.exchange_rates er
        on er.rate_date = current_date
       and er.from_currency = s.currency_code
       and er.to_currency = u.report_currency
),

regular_transactions as (
    select
        t.id,
        t.transaction_date,
        t.created_at,
        t.transaction_type as operation_type,
        t.amount_original as amount_from,
        t.currency_original as currency_from,
        null::numeric as amount_to,
        null::text as currency_to,
        coalesce(a.name, '-') as from_account_name,
        null::text as to_account_name,
        t.description,
        'transaction' as source
    from moneytrack.transactions t
    join user_row u on u.user_id = t.user_id
    left join moneytrack.accounts a on a.id = t.account_id
),

transfer_transactions as (
    select
        tr.id,
        tr.transfer_date as transaction_date,
        tr.created_at,
        tr.transfer_type as operation_type,
        tr.from_amount as amount_from,
        tr.from_currency as currency_from,
        tr.to_amount as amount_to,
        tr.to_currency as currency_to,
        coalesce(fa.name, '-') as from_account_name,
        coalesce(ta.name, '-') as to_account_name,
        tr.transfer_type as description,
        'transfer' as source
    from moneytrack.transfers tr
    join user_row u on u.user_id = tr.user_id
    left join moneytrack.accounts fa on fa.id = tr.from_account_id
    left join moneytrack.accounts ta on ta.id = tr.to_account_id
),

last_operations as (
    select *
    from (
        select * from regular_transactions
        union all
        select * from transfer_transactions
    ) x
    order by transaction_date desc, created_at desc, id desc
    limit 20
)

select json_build_object(
    'settings', json_build_object(
        'base_currency', u.base_currency,
        'report_currency', u.report_currency,
        'language_code', u.language_code
    ),

    'summary', json_build_object(
        'period', to_char(current_date, 'YYYY-MM'),
        'currency', u.report_currency,
        'income', coalesce((select sum(income_report) from summary_converted), 0),
        'expense', coalesce((select sum(expense_report) from summary_converted), 0),
        'adjustment', coalesce((select sum(adjustment_report) from summary_converted), 0),
        'result', coalesce((select sum(result_report) from summary_converted), 0)
    ),

    'summary_by_currency', (
        select coalesce(json_agg(x order by x.currency_code), '[]'::json)
        from (
            select
                currency_code,
                income,
                expense,
                adjustment,
                result,
                rate_to_report
            from summary_converted
        ) x
    ),

    'accounts', (
        select coalesce(json_agg(a order by a.sort_order nulls last, a.name), '[]'::json)
        from (
            select
                acc.id,
                acc.parent_id,
                acc.name,
                acc.account_type,
                acc.currency_code,
                acc.sort_order,
                coalesce(b.balance, 0) as balance
            from moneytrack.accounts acc
            join user_row uu on uu.user_id = acc.user_id
            left join balances b on b.account_id = acc.id
            where acc.is_active = true
            order by acc.parent_id nulls first, acc.sort_order nulls last, acc.name
        ) a
    ),

    'transactions', (
        select coalesce(json_agg(t), '[]'::json)
        from (
            select *
            from last_operations
        ) t
    )
) as data

from user_row u;

select json_build_object(
  'currency', 'EUR',
  'summary', json_build_object(
    'income', coalesce(sum(case when transaction_type='income' then amount_original else 0 end),0),
    'expense', coalesce(sum(case when transaction_type='expense' then amount_original else 0 end),0),
    'balance',
      coalesce(sum(case when transaction_type='income' then amount_original else 0 end),0)
      - coalesce(sum(case when transaction_type='expense' then amount_original else 0 end),0)
  ),

'accounts', (
  select coalesce(json_agg(a), '[]'::json)
  from (
    select
      acc.id,
      acc.name,
      acc.currency_code,
      coalesce(
        sum(
          case
            when t.transaction_type = 'income'
              then t.amount_original
            when t.transaction_type = 'expense'
              then -t.amount_original
            else 0
          end
        ),
        0
      ) as balance
    from moneytrack.accounts acc
    left join moneytrack.transactions t
      on t.account_id = acc.id
    where acc.user_id = 1
    group by
      acc.id,
      acc.name,
      acc.currency_code
    order by acc.name
  ) a
),

  
  'transactions', (
    select coalesce(json_agg(x), '[]'::json)
    from (
      select
        t.id,
        t.transaction_type,
        t.transaction_date,
        t.amount_original,
        t.currency_original,
        t.description,
        coalesce(a.name,'-') as account_name
      from moneytrack.transactions t
      left join moneytrack.accounts a on a.id=t.account_id
      where t.user_id=1
      order by t.transaction_date desc,t.id desc
      limit 10
    ) x
  )
) as data
from moneytrack.transactions
where user_id=1;
